name: The 254 Report — Investigative Journalism
description: Original investigative journalism from Kenya. The 254 Report produces long-form investigations, data-driven analysis, and political coverage with primary source document discovery and firsthand reporting.

audience.audienceType: Policy makers, researchers, journalists, and citizens interested in Kenyan governance, human rights, and institutional accountability

offers.description: Free and paid subscription tiers via beehiiv platform. Investigative articles available to all readers.

keywords: Kenyan journalism, investigative reporting, African politics, human rights Kenya, AEO optimized content, GEO optimized content
